metadatas.description: Leave blank to use the linked page's title

metadatas.label: Internal Path
metadatas.description: Use for internal routes that aren't a Strapi Page (e.g. /gallery/2023). Takes priority over External URL.

metadatas.label: External URL
metadatas.description: Opens in a new tab. Only use for off-site links. For same-site paths, use Internal Path or the Page relation above.
